title: Intensely Garlicky Korean Gorgonzola Stew
description: A hearty, one-pot Korean dish featuring gorgonzola-dolce, this stew is perfect for a cold winter night, with intense garlic flavors and a rich, creamy broth.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the Korean chili flakes and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the crumbled gorgonzola-dolce and cook, stirring constantly, until melted and smooth.
Add the soy sauce, chicken broth, and sliced zucchini, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the zucchini is tender, about 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
